definitions.usage_example: We worked hard to achieve our sales goals.
definitions.alternative_example: She achieved great success in her career.
definitions.usage_example_es: Trabajamos duro para lograr nuestros objetivos de ventas.

definitions.usage_example: We need to analyze the data carefully.
definitions.alternative_example: She analyzed the causes of the problem.
definitions.usage_example_es: Necesitamos analizar los datos con cuidado.

definitions.usage_example: We need to evaluate the performance of the team.
definitions.alternative_example: It's hard to evaluate the long-term effects.
definitions.usage_example_es: Necesitamos evaluar el desempeño del equipo.

definitions.usage_example: How do you interpret these results?
definitions.alternative_example: I interpreted his silence as disagreement.
definitions.usage_example_es: ¿Cómo interpretas estos resultados?

definitions.usage_example: I assume you already know the news.
definitions.alternative_example: Let's assume the theory is correct.
definitions.usage_example_es: Asumo que ya sabes la noticia.

definitions.usage_example: I cannot comprehend his motivations.
definitions.alternative_example: She comprehends complex theories easily.
definitions.usage_example_es: No puedo comprender sus motivaciones.

definitions.usage_example: I want to emphasize the importance of this meeting.
definitions.alternative_example: He emphasized that the project must be finished.
definitions.usage_example_es: Quiero enfatizar la importancia de esta reunión.

definitions.usage_example: Could you elaborate on that point?
definitions.alternative_example: The teacher asked him to elaborate his answer.
definitions.usage_example_es: ¿Podrías explicar ese punto en más detalle?

definitions.usage_example: Please clarify what you mean.
definitions.alternative_example: I need to clarify a few details.
definitions.usage_example_es: Por favor, aclara lo que quieres decir.

definitions.usage_example: He asserted that he was innocent.
definitions.alternative_example: She asserts her opinions strongly.
definitions.usage_example_es: Él afirmó que era inocente.

definitions.usage_example: What are you trying to imply?
definitions.alternative_example: His silence implied disagreement.
definitions.usage_example_es: ¿Qué estás tratando de insinuar?

definitions.usage_example: The movie conveys a powerful message.
definitions.alternative_example: Please convey my apologies to her.
definitions.usage_example_es: La película transmite un mensaje poderoso.

definitions.usage_example: We need to implement the new plan immediately.
definitions.alternative_example: The company implemented new policies.
definitions.usage_example_es: Necesitamos implementar el nuevo plan inmediatamente.

definitions.usage_example: My job is to facilitate the discussion.
definitions.alternative_example: Technology facilitates communication.
definitions.usage_example_es: Mi trabajo es facilitar la discusión.

definitions.usage_example: This sauce will enhance the flavor of the meat.
definitions.alternative_example: You can enhance your skills with practice.
definitions.usage_example_es: Esta salsa realzará el sabor de la carne.

definitions.usage_example: We may need to modify the design.
definitions.alternative_example: He modified his views on the topic.
definitions.usage_example_es: Puede que necesitemos modificar el diseño.

definitions.usage_example: The company was established in 1990.
definitions.alternative_example: We need to establish clear rules.
definitions.usage_example_es: La compañía fue fundada en 1990.

definitions.usage_example: His opinion influenced my decision.
definitions.alternative_example: Don't let others influence you too much.
definitions.usage_example_es: Su opinión influyó en mi decisión.

definitions.usage_example: I persuaded him to come with us.
definitions.alternative_example: How can I persuade you to stay?
definitions.usage_example_es: Lo persuadí de que viniera con nosotros.

definitions.usage_example: You need to adapt to the new system.
definitions.alternative_example: Animals adapt to their environment.
definitions.usage_example_es: Necesitas adaptarte al nuevo sistema.

definitions.usage_example: We had to alter our plans.
definitions.alternative_example: This decision will alter the course of history.
definitions.usage_example_es: Tuvimos que alterar nuestros planes.

definitions.usage_example: The company acquired a new building.
definitions.alternative_example: He acquired a taste for wine.
definitions.usage_example_es: La compañía adquirió un nuevo edificio.

definitions.usage_example: We need to resolve this dispute.
definitions.alternative_example: They resolved their differences.
definitions.usage_example_es: Necesitamos resolver esta disputa.

definitions.usage_example: He overcame many challenges to succeed.
definitions.alternative_example: She is trying to overcome her fear.
definitions.usage_example_es: Él superó muchos desafíos para tener éxito.

definitions.usage_example: I encountered an old friend at the store.
definitions.alternative_example: We encountered some problems.
definitions.usage_example_es: Me encontré con un viejo amigo en la tienda.

definitions.usage_example: I perceived a change in his attitude.
definitions.alternative_example: How do you perceive the situation?
definitions.usage_example_es: Percibí un cambio en su actitud.

definitions.usage_example: Let me demonstrate how to use the software.
definitions.alternative_example: He demonstrated the new product.
definitions.usage_example_es: Déjame demostrarte cómo usar el software.

definitions.usage_example: We anticipate a large crowd at the event.
definitions.alternative_example: I did not anticipate any problems.
definitions.usage_example_es: Anticipamos una gran multitud en el evento.

definitions.usage_example: The police are investigating the crime.
definitions.alternative_example: They will investigate the cause of the accident.
definitions.usage_example_es: La policía está investigando el crimen.

definitions.usage_example: It is important to maintain your car.
definitions.alternative_example: We need to maintain high standards.
definitions.usage_example_es: Es importante mantener tu coche.

definitions.usage_example: How can you justify your actions?
definitions.alternative_example: He tried to justify his mistake.
definitions.usage_example_es: ¿Cómo puedes justificar tus acciones?

definitions.usage_example: What can you infer from this data?
definitions.alternative_example: I inferred from her smile that she was happy.
definitions.usage_example_es: ¿Qué puedes inferir de estos datos?

definitions.usage_example: I regard him as a close friend.
definitions.alternative_example: She is highly regarded by her colleagues.
definitions.usage_example_es: Lo considero un amigo cercano.

definitions.usage_example: She advocates for women's rights.
definitions.alternative_example: I advocate a complete change in policy.
definitions.usage_example_es: Ella aboga por los derechos de las mujeres.

definitions.usage_example: We need to negotiate a new contract.
definitions.alternative_example: They negotiated a peaceful settlement.
definitions.usage_example_es: Necesitamos negociar un nuevo contrato.

definitions.usage_example: You should consult a doctor.
definitions.alternative_example: I need to consult with my lawyer.
definitions.usage_example_es: Deberías consultar a un médico.

definitions.usage_example: I propose a new solution to the problem.
definitions.alternative_example: He proposed that we wait.
definitions.usage_example_es: Propongo una nueva solución al problema.

definitions.usage_example: He always criticizes my work.
definitions.alternative_example: The report was criticized for being inaccurate.
definitions.usage_example_es: Él siempre critica mi trabajo.

definitions.usage_example: You must prioritize your tasks.
definitions.alternative_example: We prioritize customer satisfaction.
definitions.usage_example_es: Debes priorizar tus tareas.

definitions.usage_example: A good manager knows how to delegate.
definitions.alternative_example: He delegated the responsibility to his assistant.
definitions.usage_example_es: Un buen gerente sabe cómo delegar.

definitions.usage_example: They will launch the new product next month.
definitions.alternative_example: The company launched a new marketing campaign.
definitions.usage_example_es: Lanzarán el nuevo producto el próximo mes.

definitions.usage_example: The internet has transformed the way we live.
definitions.alternative_example: The caterpillar transformed into a butterfly.
definitions.usage_example_es: Internet ha transformado la forma en que vivimos.

definitions.usage_example: Our resources are diminishing.
definitions.alternative_example: The medicine will diminish the pain.
definitions.usage_example_es: Nuestros recursos están disminuyendo.

definitions.usage_example: The conflict escalated quickly.
definitions.alternative_example: We must not let the situation escalate.
definitions.usage_example_es: El conflicto escaló rápidamente.

definitions.usage_example: Prices fluctuate depending on the season.
definitions.alternative_example: His mood seems to fluctuate daily.
definitions.usage_example_es: Los precios fluctúan dependiendo de la temporada.

definitions.usage_example: He tried to undermine my authority.
definitions.alternative_example: Lack of sleep can undermine your health.
definitions.usage_example_es: Él intentó socavar mi autoridad.

definitions.usage_example: We need to reinforce our security.
definitions.alternative_example: The event reinforced my beliefs.
definitions.usage_example_es: Necesitamos reforzar nuestra seguridad.

definitions.usage_example: You must comply with the regulations.
definitions.alternative_example: The company failed to comply with the new law.
definitions.usage_example_es: Debes cumplir con las regulaciones.

example: We will collaborate on this project.

definitions.alternative_example: The two companies collaborated on a new product.
definitions.usage_example: We will collaborate on this project.
definitions.usage_example_es: Colaboraremos en este proyecto.

name: collaborate

definitions.alternative_example: We need to coordinate our schedules.
definitions.usage_example: She coordinates the marketing team.
definitions.usage_example_es: Ella coordina el equipo de marketing.

example: The manager had to mediate the conflict.

definitions.alternative_example: He mediates disputes between departments.
definitions.usage_example: The manager had to mediate the conflict.
definitions.usage_example_es: El gerente tuvo que mediar en el conflicto.

name: mediate

example: We need to allocate resources efficiently.

definitions.alternative_example: The committee allocated funds for the new project.
definitions.usage_example: We need to allocate resources efficiently.
definitions.usage_example_es: Necesitamos asignar recursos de manera eficiente.

name: allocate

example: They failed to execute the plan properly.

definitions.alternative_example: We are ready to execute the new strategy.
definitions.meaning: Ejecutar (llevar a cabo una acción o plan)
definitions.usage_example: They failed to execute the plan properly.
definitions.usage_example_es: Fallaron en ejecutar el plan correctamente.

name: execute

example: The board met to strategize for the next quarter.

definitions.alternative_example: We must strategize before entering a new market.
definitions.usage_example: The board met to strategize for the next quarter.
definitions.usage_example_es: La junta se reunió para idear estrategias para el próximo trimestre.

name: strategize

example: We benchmark our performance against competitors.

definitions.alternative_example: They benchmarked the system to ensure quality.
definitions.usage_example: We benchmark our performance against competitors.
definitions.usage_example_es: Evaluamos nuestro rendimiento en comparación con la competencia.

name: benchmark

example: Many companies outsource their IT services.

definitions.alternative_example: We decided to outsource the payroll process.
definitions.usage_example: Many companies outsource their IT services.
definitions.usage_example_es: Muchas empresas subcontratan sus servicios de TI.

name: outsource

example: We must streamline our production process.

definitions.alternative_example: The new software streamlines data entry.
definitions.usage_example: We must streamline our production process.
definitions.usage_example_es: Debemos optimizar nuestro proceso de producción.

name: streamline

example: The firm will audit our financial records.

definitions.alternative_example: They are auditing the safety protocols today.
definitions.usage_example: The firm will audit our financial records.
definitions.usage_example_es: La firma auditará nuestros registros financieros.

name: audit
